channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Border czar announces Minnesota immigration operation surge is ending
item.description: Border czar Tom Homan announced Thursday that Operation Metro Surge in Minnesota is concluding, with a drawdown of federal immigration officers set to...

item.title: Watch Live: Minnesota officials testify at Senate hearing on immigration
item.description: Four Minnesota officials and the leaders of three major immigration agencies are testifying before the Senate Homeland Security Committee on Thursday.

item.title: 2 US Navy ships collide in Caribbean, minor injuries reported
item.description: Two U.S. Navy ships collided in the Caribbean on Wednesday resulting in two minor injuries, both ships are continuing to sail safely.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Neighbors asked to look for older video footage
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: Minneapolis live updates: Minneapolis surge ending, Homan says
item.description: The White House's border czar, Tom Homan, said last Thursday that he expected a partial drawdown of federal agents to begin in Minnesota.

item.title: 1,700-pound great white shark spotted off North Carolina coast
item.description: Contender, a 1,700-pound adult great white shark, was seen moving north after spending time in Florida waters.

item.title: WATCH: Dogs take on the Winter Games
item.description: As the real Winter Games take place thousands of miles away in Italy, two dogs brought it home in the U.S., delivering gold-medal-worthy performances.

item.title: WATCH: Couple's love story started on a boat as volunteers
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to Gary and Susan, who met while providing medical care aboard a hospital ship.

item.title: Constance Zimmer on portraying powerful characters and the future of "The Lincoln Lawyer"
item.description: Constance Zimmer, who stars in the new season of "The Lincoln Lawyer," talks about how she channels her powerful character in the series and why it's ...

item.title: What are today's mortgage interest rates: February 12, 2026?
item.description: Want to buy a home or refinance your current one? These are the mortgage interest rates to know right now.

item.title: FBI combs desert terrain for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
Pentagon let CBP use anti-drone laser before FAA closed El Paso airspace, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

item.title: Few leads in Guthrie investigation after 11 days, yet cases often break unexpectedly
